justification: Boundaries correct: 10 is heavy (weight < 10 guard means 10 falls through to heavy), 50 is freight (weight < 50 guard means 50 falls through to freight). All 5 ACs covered with explicit AC-to-test mapping in acceptance_criteria_coverage. No external runtime dependencies. No features beyond spec (WeightValidationError is a reasonable refinement, not an added feature). Confidence level 98 >= 85. 11 tests including boundary values 9.99 and 49.99.

observations.text: Guard clause approach (< 10, < 50) naturally encodes correct inclusive boundaries without off-by-one risk
Boundary edge values 9.99 and 49.99 tested in addition to exact boundary values
WeightValidationError deviation is well-justified and backward-compatible with spec intent
Assumptions about upper freight boundary (1000 inclusive) and negative weights are explicitly documented
acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 5 ACs to specific named tests with explanatory notes
